title: NormalASM Continued
description: Continuation of rebranded optimization mod for 1.12.2.
body:
### ⚠️ This mod is continuation of a [rebranded fork (NormalASM)](https://modrinth.com/mod/normalasm) of [L***ASM](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lolasm) by Rongmario.

As of version 5+, this mod is now explicitly incompatible with VanillaFix and TexFix as their functionalities have been improved upon and added to the mod.

**What this mod does:**
1. Optimize RAM usage. Here's what happens when you add it to a large modpack (without Foamfix):
![Memory Comparsion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/280bb04122a7f7d7e5d03bcdefebe89fdf518b5b.png)

2. Fixes crashes, within different mods, and Forge itself. 
3. Optimizes code in general.

As of 2.3, requires [MixinBooter](https://modrinth.com/mod/mixinbooter).

Recommend using [VintageFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/vintagefix) along with this.
